title: CRM Template - Connect Board columns w/ Secondary Info
excerpt:

posts.author: MortenN (Morten Nielsen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Having the ability to modify or create connect board columns of the same type as the ones created through the monday CRM template in the monday CRM product would be amazing.

Right now it is locked to contacts being the primary connection on deals. This makes perfect sense for B2C oriented companies, but less so for B2B, where in some cases the contact is somewhat “unimportant”.

Being able to modify/create the connect board columns to utilise this UX within the monday CRM product and potentially being able to select what the secondary information should be, would be a perfect addition.

posts.author: Fabienvlems (Fabien)
posts.cookedHtml:
Echoing this.

It would be great if the accounts board could be primary connection cause they have the deals & contacts connected for us.
